message:
fix(lua): string.format missing arg error and capture sentinel ambiguity

- string.format: error on missing arguments instead of silent nil
  substitution (matches Lua 5.1 behavior)
- Pattern matching: LuaCapture::Substring end field changed from
  usize (with 0 as sentinel) to Option<usize> (None = unclosed),
  fixing ambiguity with legitimate zero-length captures at position 0

Closes: frankenredis-b02

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 (1M context) <noreply@anthropic.com>
